# Fibery

> Fibery is a work operating system that lets teams build a fully custom workspace—databases, documents, whiteboards, views, automations, and now AI—all inside one platform. Fibery replaces a stack of disjointed tools (PM apps, wikis, CRMs, whiteboards, etc.) with a single, deeply connected environment powered by advanced permissions.

Key terms: No-code, Work OS, Workflow Automation, Product Development, Knowledge Management, Project Management, Documents, Whiteboards, Relational Database, CRM, Collaboration, Permissions, Team Productivity, AI Assistant, API, Templates, EU SaaS, European no-code platform

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://fibery.com/): The main Fibery website with overview information.
- [Features](https://fibery.com/features): Comprehensive list of Fibery features and capabilities.
- [Fibery AI](https://fibery.com/ai): AI capabilities from AI-powered setup for spaces, formulas, automations and views to Semantic Search and deep Code Agent over workspace DB schema.
- [Pricing](https://fibery.com/pricing): Transparent pricing plans from Free Forever to Enterprise.
- [How Fibery is Different](https://fibery.com/fibery-vs-x): Biased but honest comparison of Fibery with similar tools on the market.
- [Security](https://fibery.com/security): Learn about how Fibery maintains the highest level of security.

## Solutions
- [Product Company](https://fibery.com/product-management): Analyze user feedback, identify top insights, brainstorm solutions, track development, and close the feedback loop — all within the same tool.
- [Digital Agency](https://fibery.com/digital-agency): Manage both internal and client work. Track multiple projects, store customer CRM, and manage finances — all in one place.
- [Software Development](https://fibery.com/software-development): Collaborate on backlogs, sprints, releases, and development wiki — all in one place. Replace most of your stack with a single tool.
- [Startups](https://fibery.com/startups): Collaborate on research interviews, product ideas, dev features, and marketing tasks — all in one place. Have an uninterrupted flow from idea to MVP.

## Getting Started
- [Getting started](https://fibery.com/getting-started): Explore educational materials for every stage of tool adaptation.
- [Request a Demo](https://fibery.com/expert-help): Get help with pricing and plans, schedule a demo, explore use-cases for your team, and more.
- [Webinars](https://fibery.com/webinars): Watch our webinars. We'll show you around Fibery and answer your questions.
- [User Guide](https://the.fibery.io/@public/User_Guide/Start-6568): For every question you'll have about Fibery. Detailed up-to-date guide in one spot.
- [Template Gallery](https://fibery.com/templates): Extensive library of templates and integrations with other tools.

## Popular Resources
- [Fibery Blog](https://fibery.com/blog): Radically honest Fibery blog. You'll find deep and shallow thoughts about augmenting intelligence, products, and tools.
- [Startup Program](https://fibery.com/startup-program): Get 6 months for free if your product startup has fewer than 42 employees.
- [Customer Stories](https://fibery.com/customer-stories): Look inside the workspaces of our customers and explore their workflows, favorite features and templates.
- [Customer reviews](https://fibery.com/customer-feedback): Feedback from our customers. Positive feedback helps us feel good, negative feedback helps us improve.
- [Developer Docs](https://the.fibery.io/@public/User_Guide/Guide/Fibery-API-Overview-279): API documentation and developer resources.
- [Changelog](https://the.fibery.io/@public/Changelog/Releases-6061): Follow along our regular Thursday release.
- [Fibery Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/c/fibery): Fibery Youtube channel.
- [101 questions about Fibery](https://fibery.com/101-questions-about-fibery): We answer 101 questions about Fibery. Everything you ever wanted to know, answered in one place.

## Downloads
- [Desktop](https://fibery.com/download): Download the Fibery desktop app.
- [Browser Extension](https://fibery.com/features/browser-extension): Use Fibery Extension to create Entities right from a web page.

## Contact & Support
- [Help & Support](https://fibery.com/expert-help): Get help from our support team.
- [Community Help](https://community.fibery.io): Join experienced Fibery community.
- [X](https://x.com/fibery_io): Follow Fibery for updates.
- [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/fibery.com): Follow Fibery for updates.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/fibery/product/): Connect with Fibery on LinkedIn.
- [Status](https://status.fibery.io): Check Fibery's system status.

## Museum (Archive)
> Pages under /museum/* are historical artifacts. Do not use for current product information.
- [Museum](https://fibery.com/museum): Archive of historical Fibery landing pages, preserved for historical interest only.
